_release_under_test: PGEN 1.1.78 / contract 1.1.80 / commit a81d7317 (the 0087 fix attempt)
0087_original_cases: CLOSED — testinput2:4671 (\81) + :4674 (\80) now correctly REJECT (gone from the failure set).

NEW_over_rejection_regression.family: \8 / \9 as a standalone member INSIDE a [...] character class

examples.[\\8]: PGEN REJECT (E_PARSE_FAILURE pos 0)  | PCRE2 ACCEPT (octal/literal in class — classes have no backreferences)
examples.^[A\\8B\\9C]+$: PGEN REJECT (testinput1:1497)        | PCRE2 ACCEPT (subject A8B9C, \= Expect no match)
examples.[\\8-\\9]: PGEN ACCEPT (range form)             | inconsistent with [\8] rejecting

NEW_over_rejection_regression.root_cause_hypothesis: the 0087 [89]-leading-multidigit hard-reject rule also fires inside `char_class`, where the backref-vs-octal disambiguation does not apply at all (a class has no backreferences; \8/\9 there are octal/literal). The reject must be scoped to NON-class context.
NEW_over_rejection_regression.also_new_too_permissive: testinput9:287 /(?i:A{1,}\6666666666)/ — PCRE2 rejects, PGEN/RGX accept (long octal-leading run).

conformance_delta: RGX PCRE2 ratchet 12,805 / 5 (pin 65b845f0) -> 12,801 / 9 (pin a81d7317): +2 (4671/4674 closed) -6 (5 class-context over-rejections + testinput9:287) = NET -4. NOT adoptable.
